title: Worker Simulator
description: Work your way to becoming the richest person standing.
body:
# Worker Simulator
Worker SImulator is a map inspired by Grand Theft Auto RP, its main focus is giving lots of gameplay variety to players by introducing different stores, items, events and gameplay elements. Players need to earn money by hard work, which they can spend on equipment to apply for new jobs, or on fun stuff, like cosmetic items, guns, melee weapons or cars. 

Worker Simulator fully supports multiplayer, for best experience play with 2-3 other people.

![streetvile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee527c485db1fbcbfff6692a6e733292fb2fbb01.png)
![sirograd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc462a825f9b1e654db8537dd80f048ac8fcb225.png)

## Supported Languages:

    English (United States),
    Ukrainian (Ukraine),
    Russian (Russia)

## Features

    12 Jobs
    2 Cities
    Fast Food
    Undercover Mafia Group
    Police Agency
    Customizable Flats
    Houses
    Cars
    Car Upgrades
    Melee Weapons
    Firearms
    Functional Race Track
    Businesses
    Over 70 Achievements
